name: mobius
description: Local-only opt-in plan and loop gates for explicit Mobius goals.

interface.shortDescription: Plan it, loop it, accept only by recorded review.
interface.longDescription: Mobius is a local-only, opt-in project-private state machine for explicitly targeted goals. Users create a locked contract with mobius-plan, then mobius-loop drives the full plan through stage gates and recorded reviews until a terminal result or real stop condition.
defaultPrompt: Create and lock a Mobius goal contract.
Run a locked Mobius goal through the full loop.
